title: Amor de Perdição
writer: Camilo Castelo Branco, Sergio Miranda, Guedes de Oliveira
actors: Pato Moniz, António Pinheiro, Brunilde Júdice
plot: Simão loves Teresa whose father wants her to marry cousin Baltazar instead. The two lovers meet secretly; Baltazar pays a thug to kill his rival, and Simão is badly wounded. Teresa is forced into a convent. Mariana - who secretly ...
